title: The Watcher: TBS
description: A slow-burn meta-horror mod that induces paranoia and breaks the fourth wall.
body:
**The Watcher** is a slow-burn horror mod for Forge 1.20.1 designed to induce deep paranoia. It doesn't rely on constant jumpscares; instead, it uses subtle anomalies, world corruption, and psychological tension to make you feel watched.

**Important:** If you want to stop all active events and anomalies, use the command: /watcher_stop.

**⚠️ WARNING: SYSTEM ANOMALY DETECTED**

**The Wacther tbs is not just a mod;** it's an intrusion. By installing this, you agree to the following "meta-horror" events:

**Visual Disruptions:** The game window may shake or display simulated system errors.

**Personal Interaction:** The entity knows who is playing. It will address you directly.

**World Rot:** Your buildings are not safe. The entity will actively grief and "corrupt" your world.

**Fourth Wall Breaks:** Expect messages and events that shouldn't be possible within a standard mod.

**All effects are simulated and stay within the game environment. No actual system damage is performed.**

**World Gen:** Standard world generation is highly recommended. World-gen mods may break the AI scripts.

**Crashes:** Sudden game crashes are a part of the "Watcher" experience.

**Paranoia:** Random events and entities that watch you from the distance without attacking immediately.

**Ending 000**
If you want to completely complete the story, rename any object to 000. That's the end. You'll be free of it.
